Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Alagaeus]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Alagaeus was the Regent of the East and was assassinated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 8''' — Alagaeus was assassinated.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 14''' — Alagaeus is dead.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Alagaeus is the Regent of the East.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Alagaeus has lived for approximately one hundred years.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Alagaeus is a Soulbound.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Alagaeus is the shaper of deserts and builder of cities.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 1''' — Alagaeus believed that power gives one the right to make choices.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 4''' — Alagaeus is a Regent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 6''' — It is possible for Alagaeus to have survived.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 9''' — Alagaeus joined the group after the Emperor began calling himself the Emperor.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 25''' — Alagaeus possesses a bronze staff.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 3''' — Alagaeus is likely to burn everything built to the ground.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Alagaeus was the Soulbound to the Heart of the Earth.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 9''' — Alagaeus was one of those who buried Othaghor.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 11''' — A candlewick once belonged to Alagaeus.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 18''' — Alagaeus is a person Loreli has talent comparable to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — Alagaeus is a short, squat Heartlander.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 19''' — Alagaeus is referred to as the fourth Regent.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Alagaeus is described as squat with an emerald-topped staff.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 21''' — Alagaeus sneered and ground his staff against the dock.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 27''' — Alagaeus's name was erased and replaced with Shera Gardener.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
